channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House GOP cancels Friday votes amid SAVE America Act standoff
item.description: House Republican leaders canceled planned votes for Friday after an internal GOP standoff over election legislation.

item.title: DHS Sec Mullin confronts Rosa DeLauro in fiery hearing exchange
Lawmakers debate AI's role in America's classrooms
item.description: The Senate is considering how AI should be used in classrooms amid concerns about learning, privacy, and cognitive impacts.

item.title: Long Island school clerk accused of destroying ballots to rig election
